name: agricultural_policy_near_miss_event_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A Agricultural Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving agricultural policy near miss event marrowbridge tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Nadia Navarro
agents.identity: I am Nadia Navarro, accountable for a defensible call in Agricultural Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Harper Kaur
agents.identity: I am Harper Kaur, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Agricultural Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Nadia Navarro must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Nadia Navarro do?
